title: BEM-850 execute followup
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/protocols','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 16:40 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
prev=load('governance/state/bem849_verify_protocol_followup_response.json')
decision=prev.get('decision','UNKNOWN')
status_in=prev.get('status','unknown')
draft=Path('governance/protocols/BEM845_AGREED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL_DRAFT.md')
created_files=[]
if decision=='APPROVED' or status_in=='followup_approved_finalize_next':
    final=Path('governance/protocols/BEM850_AGREED_MULTI_AGENT_PROTOCOL_FINAL.md')
    final.write_text('# BEM-850 | Agreed Multi-Agent Protocol | FINAL'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Decision: APPROVED'+sep+sep+'Source draft: '+str(draft)+sep+sep+read(draft)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(final))
    status='final_protocol_created'
    next_action='publish operator-facing summary and continue roadmap implementation'
elif status_in=='followup_requires_changes_continue_next':
    follow=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem850_protocol_changes_response.md')
    follow.write_text('# BEM-850 | PROTOCOL CHANGE LOOP'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude requested changes or blocker. GPT will update the protocol and request final approval. Provide exact final approval criteria in table and Decision: APPROVED when satisfied. No issue comments.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem850_protocol_changes_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v13','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-850 continue protocol change loop','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.extend([str(follow),str(q)])
    status='protocol_change_loop_continued'
    next_action='fresh tick, read Claude criteria, update protocol'
elif status_in in ['no_followup_response_yet','followup_response_without_decision']:
    req=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem850_explicit_decision_request.md')
    req.write_text('# BEM-850 | EXPLICIT DECISION REQUEST'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: return explicit Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED for BEM845 protocol draft and BEM847 followup. No issue comments.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem850_explicit_decision_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v13','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-850 request explicit protocol decision','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.extend([str(req),str(q)])
    status='explicit_decision_request_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick and verify explicit decision response'
else:
    status='unknown_followup_state'
    next_action='diagnose BEM-849 status and continue'
state={'bem':'BEM-850','status':status,'input_status':status_in,'decision':decision,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem850_execute_followup_decision.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem850_execute_followup_decision.md').write_text('# BEM-850 | Execute Followup Decision | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem850_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-850'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem850_execute_followup_decision.json','governance/reports/bem850_execute_followup_decision.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem850_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-849 followup decision by finalizing approved protocol or continuing explicit decision/change loop')
"""
No issue comments.
